speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect. Following that, the task board contract that you recovered and was assigned to you by the Herald of the Hall contains both the Writ of Lawmaster Intent, which is what will give you approval to travel into the sewer without being harried by the Crownsguard, and also gives you the location of the sewer that leads you there. Following the basic instructions and asking around, you eventually find yourselves at the corner of Ruen Road and Dewmist.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One of those shitty dueling shawls that they throw off?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Actually, what season is it? Are we north? Is it going to get cold?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The further north you go, yeah. This particular area is pretty chilly, especially since you're getting towards the end of fall. It's almost Harvest Close in two weeks. You guys are hitting winter in the very near future. You would know this, too, that snowfall is fairly common throughout the winter here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you pick me up earmuffs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course I can do that. I ask for the largest size they have and I get a woolen cap as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For both of those together? One silver piece.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay. I have that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to take your ears and roll them?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That sounds amazing. I will do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Warren T. Rat in American Tail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Two sponge rollers.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You have two attacks with the light weapon on the side, technically. Eh, I'll allow it. It's fine, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you finish coughing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Yeah, I don't want to use that just yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I see the mess this is making, and I'm going to turn around and I'm holding the sword, but I'm going to punch with the hilt of my sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Which one are you going up to, the one that Beau kicked earlier?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, the one that attacked Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it. Roll a d20 and add your strength bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Plus my strength, my non-existent strength modifier. That's a 12 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 just hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's one damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You deal one point of damage to that one. As you reach down and sock it in the head--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can take a bonus attack though, and I'm going to hit it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, are you attacking with your--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm using my other hand, since technically I have two attacks, it's not two--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the fangs dig into the side of your torso, you pull back and try and defend yourself and it pierces your leather armor in your torso. It releases a huge burst of venom into your chest. You feel your lungs and heart seize for a moment and you almost fall back. That burning orcish rage from underneath gives you that last bit of inspiration to shrug off the poison and look back angrily and realize you are in deep shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's not invisible anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It lunges out towards you again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no. Shit, that's another 23. Two 19s in a row.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, you don't need me to tell you it hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is eight points of piercing damage, and I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How many?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, constitution saving throw. Oh, that's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a lot of dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you take 15 points of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all of the poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm unconscious. No! Relentl-- The thing, I got the thing! It's called Relentless Endurance! I come back to one hit point!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's Relentless!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I'm half dead.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'll tell you what. I'll give you the attack, you'll have disadvantage, and if you miss, you're prone. But I'll give you the attack if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A total of nein?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, just nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So (fwoosh), and as you throw your orb, it skitters up the wall. You almost hit it, but it pulls out of the way before it shatters, the orb splattering acid across the stonework, burning through whatever outer layer of thick liquid has congealed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From where I'm hidden to where it was when it appeared, how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where it appeared? That would've been 40 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I have to roll with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not as good. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Goes wide, no impact, unfortunately. That ends the spider's turn. Beau, Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh. Can I close the gap? With my 40 foot movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's above you on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Throw your throwing stars!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like I'm trying to get spiders out of the corner ceiling with a broomstick! Exactly.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'll tell you what. I'll give you the attack, you'll have disadvantage, and if you miss, you're prone. But I'll give you the attack if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A total of nein?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, just nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So (fwoosh), and as you throw your orb, it skitters up the wall. You almost hit it, but it pulls out of the way before it shatters, the orb splattering acid across the stonework, burning through whatever outer layer of thick liquid has congealed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From where I'm hidden to where it was when it appeared, how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where it appeared? That would've been 40 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I have to roll with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not as good. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Goes wide, no impact, unfortunately. That ends the spider's turn. Beau, Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh. Can I close the gap? With my 40 foot movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's above you on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Throw your throwing stars!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like I'm trying to get spiders out of the corner ceiling with a broomstick! Exactly.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You stuff it all in there. Beyond that, going through them, for the sake of brevity here, you find an additional 85 gold pieces, 210 silver, and 45 copper.
trigger_phrase: you find an additional 85 gold pieces

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do find another pair of studded leather armor that has like a sea motif to it. There's shells pressed into it, and a wave pattern on the edges. The person it's attached to has a bunch of tattoos across their body as well, that insinuate a lot of time at sea, different names of different ships that are different points of faded on the body. They may have been a sailor at some point in their life and has expired under here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I will quietly gather that up and put it into my bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, the armor's a full set, so it'll--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to carry that? I don't even know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, it's a leather chest plate, leather arm bands and bracers, and then leg plates as well, so it's a full set. You could probably fit all that into your bag if it's the only thing that's in your bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, he's checked all his things, and he goes, "Okay, I thank you all so much for your help. I really appreciate it. You've saved my life."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, but we're all of the same breed; we get what you're doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know I'm looking, but you don't know what I found.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We know you're going to lie about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, because everyone is so lovely, can you tell me--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gold pieces. 210 silver, and 45 copper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Vex never lied about the loot we found.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't give a fuck what Vex did.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Never once. Never once, for all the shit she got for being greedy, she never once lied about the loot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She was a good person.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, but she was a horrible person.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's a terrible half-elf.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex is retired in Whitestone right now. She's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sensing a lingering sibling rivalry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. It's carried over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hanging over the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm clearly Lawful Good. Clearly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's Thed doing?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "700 gold pieces. Hand me the writ, please. Thank you very much, and I appreciate that," and he sets it out and hands it to you. "So. You seem able-bodied. You've pulled through on something where few have been able to. If you're looking for more work, I'm sure we'll have things. Bit light at the moment, but where can we find you, if we're looking for you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Beau!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell them about the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop it, we're about to get our reward, stop being a shithead right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you would be as kind to remember these fallen soldiers who protect you and the people of this city, by delivering unto us the armor and weaponry that they had been lost with, I would be happy to go forward with delivering your reward."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Who picked up all those items, anyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have them. Here's two sets of armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of the guards collect them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And two extra helmets.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Side note  I did not come in this building. I'm hanging back and giving Identify a whirl on what's in my bag. That other armor. Outside.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Travis will never see that card.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He comes back. They bring a small chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The card that says "give to Travis."
